debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
hB : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)
hB' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)
hB'' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN
⊢ D ≤ @DirectSumDecomposition.refinement C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M D B hB hB' hB''

    exact ⟨N, hN, x, hx⟩
  refine ⟨B N hN, h₁, _⟩
  rw [hB N hN]

by
  intro N hN
  have h₁ : N = sSup (B N hN) := hB N hN
  have h₂ : sSupIndep (B N hN) := hB' N hN
  have h₃ : ⊥ ∉ B N hN := hB'' N hN
  refine' ⟨⋃ π : N ∈ D, B N π, _, _⟩
  · -- Prove that ⋃ π : N ∈ D, B N π is a subset of the refinement's carrier
    intro x hx
    simp [Set.mem_iUnion, refinement] at hx ⊢
    tauto
  · -- Prove that N is the supremum of ⋃ π : N ∈ D, B N π
    have h₄ : N = sSup (B N hN) := hB N hN
    have h₅ : sSup (⋃ π : N ∈ D, B N π) = sSup (B N hN) := by
      have h₆ : (⋃ (π : N ∈ D), B N π) = B N hN := by
        ext x
        simp [Set.mem_iUnion]
        <;>
        (try aesop) <;>
        (try {
          aesop
        }) <;>
        (try {
          simp_all [Set.ext_iff]
          <;>
          aesop
        })
        <;>
        aesop
      rw [h₆]
    rw [h₅]
    <;> simp_all

  intro N hN

  · -- Prove that B N hN ⊆ refinement B hB hB' hB''

    -- We need to find some N' and hN' such that S ∈ B N' hN'
    -- Since S ∈ B N hN, we can take N' = N and hN' = hN
    refine' ⟨N, ⟨hN, hS⟩⟩

  refine' fun N hN => ⟨B N hN, _, _⟩
  · -- Prove that `B N hN ⊆ refinement B hB hB' hB''.carrier`
    intro X hX

    exact Set.mem_iUnion₂.mpr ⟨N, hN, hX⟩
  · -- Prove that `N = sSup (B N hN)`

by
  intro N hN
  have h₁ : N = sSup (B N hN) := by
    apply hB
    <;> assumption
  
  have h₂ : sSupIndep (B N hN) := by
    apply hB'
    <;> assumption
  
  have h₃ : ∀ T ∈ B N hN, T ∈ (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier := by
    intro T hT
    simp only [refinement, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_iUnion] at *
    refine' ⟨N, hN, _⟩
    exact hT
  
  refine' ⟨B N hN, _⟩
  have h₄ : B N hN ⊆ (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier := by
    intro x hx
    exact h₃ x hx
  
  have h₅ : sSup (B N hN) = N := by
    rw [h₁]
    <;> simp [h₁]
  
  constructor
  · exact h₄
  · rw [h₅]
    <;> simp_all [h₁]

by
  intro N hN
  -- Use B N hN as the subset of refinement B hB hB' hB'' thatrefines N
  have h₁ : B N hN ⊆ (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier := by
    intro x hx
    -- x ∈ B N hN, so x is in the union over N ∈ D and hN : N ∈ D of B N hN
    refine' ⟨N, hN, x, hx⟩
  refine' ⟨B N hN, h₁, _⟩
  -- The supremum of B N hN is N by hB
  have h₂ : sSup (B N hN) = N := by
    rw [hB N hN]
    <;> simp [sSup_eq_sup]
  -- Hence, the supremum of the subset is N
  simp_all [SetLike.coe_sup]
